creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
Just for the record. I experienced this problem 11 days ago. Some processes (rsync, sshd, proftpd, httpd) where stucked at suspfs state, unkillable and system cannot be rebooted (infinite waiting after All buffers synced).
The problem appeared again today. I disabled journaling. We'll see if it helped or not.

FreeBSD 10.4-RELEASE-p9 amd64 GENERIC

FS was originally mounted as:
/dev/da1p1 on /vol0 (ufs, local, noatime, nosuid, journaled soft-updates)
